message:
feat(mermaid): requirementDiagram validation + snapshots + matrix update (bd-hudcn.1.9.2)

- Add requirement_edge_case.mmd fixture (varied kinds, long labels, multiple relation types)
- Add 200x60 large-format snapshot test for requirement-basic demo sample
- Update feature matrix: requirement rendering Unsupported -> Partial (entity boxes)
- Update pipeline: Layout+Render stages from Partial/NotStarted to Done
- All 609 lib tests, 10 fixture tests, 3 snapshot tests pass; clippy clean

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
